message.content: {"chunk_id":"chunk_000","events":[{"event_id":"visual_0001","approx_start_ms":0,"approx_end_ms":6500,"summary":"An operator in a control room signals for an action to begin while looking at monitors.","characters":["operator"],"actions":["signals","looks at monitors"],"objects":["monitors","control console"],"location":"control room","visible_text":[],"confidence":0.91},{"event_id":"visual_0002","approx_start_ms":7000,"approx_end_ms":15000,"summary":"A woman faces a man and moves her mechanical hand while he reacts.","characters":["woman","man"],"actions":["faces","moves hand","reacts"],"objects":["mechanical hand"],"location":"industrial interior","visible_text":[],"confidence":0.94},{"event_id":"visual_0003","approx_start_ms":23000,"approx_end_ms":39000,"summary":"The man and woman continue facing each other as the mechanical arm remains visible between them.","characters":["woman","man"],"actions":["face each other"],"objects":["mechanical arm"],"location":"industrial interior","visible_text":[],"confidence":0.9},{"event_id":"visual_0004","approx_start_ms":46000,"approx_end_ms":62000,"summary":"Several people watch equipment and gesture urgently in the control area.","characters":["operators"],"actions":["watch equipment","gesture"],"objects":["monitors","control panels"],"location":"control area","visible_text":[],"confidence":0.88}]}
